# Commander Spellbook Fixture Notes

Date recorded: 2026-06-21

These are local contract fixtures shaped after Commander Spellbook variant responses. They intentionally avoid live network dependency and cover combo identity, component cards, outputs, optional fields, missing required identity, malformed payloads, raw payload preservation, and unresolved component handling.

They are evidence fixtures only. They must not be used to infer sequencing, strategy labels, or recommendations.
